title: RAG Product Features
scenario: Extract and list the product features of the Rugged Adventure Gear (RAG) waterproof backpack. The product features should be organized into categories (e.g. durability, water resistance, comfort) and listed in a clear and concise manner. The output should be in a markdown format and include at least 5 product features.
constraints: Must include at least 5 product features

evaluationCriteria.description: The product features are accurately extracted from the product description.
The product features are organized into clear categories.
The product features meet the word count and feature requirements.
